action_set_definitions.name: get_topic_id_by_name
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the unique topic ID and associated metadata for a specific subject name.

topic_name.description: The name of the educational topic (e.g., 'Covalent Bonding').

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_current_state
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the World Model for the current learner state, including mastery, engagement, and history.

action_set_definitions.name: simulate_session
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates a learning interaction (World Model transition). Updates the learner's state based on the difficulty tier and scaffolding settings provided.

topic_id.description: The ID of the topic being studied.

tier.description: The difficulty level of the session.

scaffolding_enabled.description: Whether to provide interactive hints/guides (ludic scaffolding).

example_output.observation: Learner completed session with 85% accuracy. Engagement improved.

state_description.knowledge_mastery: A mapping of topic IDs to mastery levels (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.completed_content: List of IDs of curriculum modules successfully completed.
state_description.attempt_history: Log of previous attempts per module and the scores achieved.
state_description.learning_pace: The latent speed at which the student acquires new info (e.g., 'fast', 'moderate', 'slow').
